SamplingNotes: Water was slushing up in the tube because freshwater was freezing, so we sampled the water from a bowl in the truck to keep it from freezing
Ocean waves at this site were very agrressive, we lost two of the clear tubes that connect to the filters in the ocean

~ 84 % ice over, and two of the filter bags floated away in the river, so we ended up putting the filters in other plastic bags we had and transferred them into new eDNA bags at the garage… might impact results
On the way back to the truck, the person holding the filters fell and two filters touched the snow on the ground
~85% ice overage, water was slushing up in the tubes, this sampling took a very long time

extractionNotes: No field blanks associated with CBP
blank filter in tube. Cloudy solution after Qiashredder
